name: emacs
title: Emacs
description: Drive a running Emacs from Raycast via emacsclient. Extensible from elisp.
author: dwb

preferences.name: emacsclientPath
preferences.title: emacsclient Path
preferences.description: Path to the emacsclient binary. Leave blank to use ~/.nix-profile/bin/emacsclient.

commands.name: emacs-commands
commands.title: Emacs Commands
commands.description: Run a command registered in Emacs.

commands.name: select-frame
commands.title: Select Frame
commands.description: Raise and focus an Emacs frame.
